disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A pre-existing mole on the upper back has enlarged rapidly over about 3 months and now looks different from all the patient's other moles
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the mole — how long has it been changing?
Has it changed in size, shape or colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's on my upper back and over the last three months it's got bigger quite fast, and the colour has gone patchy. It looks nothing like my other moles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The lesion ulcerated after minor friction tonight and has been bleeding persistently for about two hours despite attempts at pressure
trigger_question_examples: How long has it been bleeding and can you stop it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I dried off with a towel and the middle broke open. It's been bleeding for about two hours and soaked a couple of towels — pressing helps a little but I can't reach to hold it properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New itching localised to the lesion over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: Any itching, pain or other change in the spot?
Does the area feel different from how it used to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it's started itching over the last few weeks, which it never used to.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A firm lump is present in the armpit on the same side as the lesion
trigger_question_examples: Can you gently feel under your armpit on the same side — do you notice any lumps?
Have you noticed any swelling or lumps near the spot or in your armpit or neck?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, yes — there's a firm lump in my left armpit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient lives alone and cannot physically reach the lesion to apply sustained effective pressure
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone with you who can help hold pressure?
Can you reach the spot yourself to press on it firmly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own and it's on a part of my back I just can't reach to press on properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No use of aspirin, anticoagulants or other blood-thinning medication
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any blood thinners, aspirin or warfarin?
Do you take any regular medicines or supplements?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any blood thinners or aspirin — I'm not on any regular medicines.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of intense intermittent sun exposure without protection in youth; surrounding skin looks weathered
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a lot of sun exposure over your life?
Did you get sunburnt often, or work or spend a lot of time outdoors?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I was out in the sun a lot when I was younger and never really covered up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No lightheadedness, faintness, breathlessness or palpitations reported
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy, faint or short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel dizzy or faint, my breathing's fine and my heart doesn't feel like it's racing.
